R n P l H s i d 3 W ^ W T WTT^TT, 3f*rfq;:- 1173 GI/2018 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(H)] "(iii) srf^Tjft % sfcrf^Nf % <re $t 3T^f%, [W. t. 19014/66/13-tr^frit-IV] 3TT^# SFJTFT, # 5 W *rf%3", TTKf^qW— ^ s r f H ^ H I WTW % < N M ^ , SRTTgrRW, ^TFT II, WS 3, 3 W 3 - (jj), c r r f t ^ 13 ^ H ^ O , 2014 ^i^i+ ^r.sn-. 89(sr), crrftw 13 «n«iO, 2014 srcr sRnfsm- # i f «ft afk cr?qwRi; *i^i+ ^T.W. 605(ar), cnfr^ 28 4><«ifl, 2014 ^T.SJT. 2008(sr), crrftw 7 3TTW, 2014, W.3TT. 476(3T), ?nfh¥ 16 ^H^O, 2017 affc ^T.STT. 1389(31-), WTfte" 2 Trf, 2017 ^RT *p?ftfsr?r # f t «fr i MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT (Department of Social Justice & Empowerment) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st March, 2018 S.0.888(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 29 of the Prohibition of Employment as Manual Scavengers and their Rehabilitation Act, 2013 (25 of 2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Department of Social Justice and Empowerment number S.O. 89(E), dated the 13th January, 2014, namely:— In the said notification, - (a) in clause 1, after paragraph H, the following paragraph shall be inserted, namely:- "I In pursuance of clause (m) of sub-section (2) of section 29 of the Act, the following representatives of agencies,- (i) Shri Bezwada Wilson- Safai Karmachari Andolan (ii) Shri Asif Shaikh Jan Sahas (Garima Abhiyan) (b) in clause 2, after sub-clause (ii), the following sub-clause shall be inserted, namely:- "(iii) The term of office of the representatives of the agencies who are nominated under sub-paragraph I shall be for a period of three years from the date of publication of this notification." [F.No. 19014/66/13-SCD-1V] AINDRI ANURAG, Jt. Secy. Footnote:- The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated 13th January, 2014, vide number S.O. 89(E), dated the 13th January, 2014 and was subsequently amended vide numbers S.O. 605(E), dated the 28th February, 2014, S.O. 2008(E), dated the 7th August, 2014, S.O. 476(E) dated the 16th Febaiary, 2017 and S.O. 1389(E) dated the 2nd May, 2017. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054.
